name: Crab Stuffed Chicken Breasts
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin and bone the chicken breasts; pound to flatten.
2. Sprinkle with a little salt and pepper.
3. Cook onion and celery in 3 tablespoons butter until tender.
4. Remove from heat; add 3 tablespoons white wine, crabmeat, and stuffing mix, and toss.
5. Divide mixture among breasts and roll up, securing each one.
6. Combine flour, paprika, coat the chicken with this mixture.
7. Place rolled chicken in an 11-inch X 7-inch X 2-inch baking dish.
8. Drizzle with 2 tablespoons melted butter.
9. Bake uncovered at 375 degrees for 1 hour.
10. Transfer to a platter.
11. Blend the Hollandaise sauce mix, milk. Cook, stirring until thick.
12. Add remaining white wine and cheese, stir until cheese melts.
13. Serve over chicken.
